collab.off_confirm_body: Turning it off stops everyone here from editing and invalidates the link. Turning it on again issues a new link.
collab.choice_title: How do you want to share?
collab.choice_copy_desc: The other person gets their own copy (classic)
collab.choice_collab_desc: Join the same sheet and edit at the same time
collab.cursor_optin_body: When you turn on cursor sharing, you and other participants who also have it on can see each other's cursors.
collab.cursor_optin_ip: This feature uses a direct peer-to-peer (P2P) connection between players. Due to the nature of this connection, your IP address may be visible to others in the same room. However, this connection cannot access your personal data, account info, or local files. Only users with the room link can join.
collab.cursor_optin_reassure: This connection will not occur unless you enable this feature. You can turn it off at any time.
collab.cursor_fallback: Your cursor isn't visible to others right now (couldn't connect).
collab.warning: Anyone with this link can directly rewrite your sheet (this can't be undone). Use it only within your fixed group; do not post or share it externally such as on social media.
collab.info: Up to {{max}} people can join (logged-in people edit / others can only view). This sheet stays in your account (co-editing just edits your sheet directly together). You can disable co-editing anytime with "Revoke link" below.
collab.people_hint: Default 8 (one full party). Set between 1 and {{max}}.
collab.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
collab.joiner_invalid: This collaboration link is no longer valid.
collab.joiner_revoked: This collaboration has ended (the owner revoked the link).
collab.consent_body_1: This is not your plan — it's someone's real shared plan. Your edits apply to everyone in real time.
collab.consent_body_2: There is no undo yet. Use this only within your static group, and check carefully before editing.
collab.banner_edit: This is {{label}}'s real plan. Edits apply to everyone and cannot be undone.
collab.banner_edit_nolabel: This is a real shared plan. Edits apply to everyone and cannot be undone.
collab.banner_consent: You must agree to the notice before editing.
collab.banner_login: View only. Log in to edit.

app.title: LoPo Mitigation Planner
app.popular_display_notice: Shared mitigation sheets are aggregated anonymously and may appear on the Popular page. If logo is on, it will also be shown there.
app.plan_deleted_remotely: Synced: a table was deleted on another device
app.plan_conflict_detected: Changes detected on another device. Both versions have been saved.
app.share_guest_hint: <login>Sign in</login> to sync data across devices and customize shared images.
app.share_not_found: This shared plan was not found
app.decompress_error: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page. If you are not signed in, the data may not be recoverable.
app.page_title_landing: LoPo | FFXIV Mitigation Sheet & Housing | Mobile-Friendly
app.page_description_landing: Build your FFXIV mitigation sheet on mobile or desktop. Place mitigation skills on a timeline and see damage calculated automatically. Share sheets via URL.

login.title: Sign In
login.benefit_message: You can create, edit, and share mitigation sheets without logging in. Log in to save your sheets and set a team logo.
login.privacy_message: Sign in with Discord. No personal information such as email addresses is stored on our servers.
login.twitter_retired_notice:
X (Twitter) login was retired in May 2026 because X's policy changes made it hard to keep LoPo's principle of holding only minimal personal data.

Only 1 user had ever signed in with X, and we don't store any personally identifying information. Mitigation sheet data has been backed up in its anonymous form. If you are affected, please reach out via Discord and we'll help you recover.

support.title: Support LoPo
support.subtitle: Help keep LoPo running
support.heart_body: LoPo is a fan tool I'm developing on my own for FF14. There are still many bugs and missing features, but I want to keep growing it into a tool you can rely on for the long run.
support.about_body: LoPo is a personally-run fan tool for FF14. The mitigation planner is currently public, and a housing tour planner and other tools are planned for the future.
support.usage_items: Server costs (Vercel & Firebase),Storage costs (shared sheet storage & OGP image generation),Development time and motivation
support.kofi_about_body: Ko-fi is a UK-based creator support platform. LoPo accepts donations only through PayPal (no PayPal account required — you can also pay by credit card via PayPal's guest checkout). Payments are processed by PayPal so your card information never reaches LoPo. However, the supporter's name and email address do reach the operator through Ko-fi's dashboard and the operator's PayPal dashboard (see the section below for details).
support.data_heading: What reaches me (the developer) when you donate
support.data_intro: LoPo accepts donations only through PayPal via Ko-fi. When you donate, the following information reaches my dashboards.
support.data_kofi_items: Display name (leaving the Display Name field blank shows "Somebody" on the public page),Email address,Cheer message (optional),Donation amount and timestamp
support.data_paypal_items: PayPal-registered name — typically a legal name for Personal accounts. For Business accounts a chosen display name,PayPal-registered email address,Donation amount and timestamp
support.data_promise: I will not contact you using your email address. I do not send marketing email or share your information with third parties. I do not separately store or record what I receive — I only check the Ko-fi or PayPal dashboards when needed.
support.data_tips_items: Display name — leaving the Display Name field blank in the Ko-fi support form shows "Somebody" on the public page (a nickname also works),PayPal — using a Business account lets you set a chosen name when paying. PayPal's design still routes a name to the operator's PayPal dashboard so it cannot be hidden completely,Email address — please consider using an email different from the one you use day to day (e.g. one created specifically for donations)
support.amounts_heading: What does your support actually do?
support.amount_500: ☕ ¥500 — A nice cup of coffee. I'll be smiling all day.
support.amount_1000: 🍱 ¥1,000 — A lunch. I can stay positive even on late-night solo dev sessions.
support.amount_3000: 💪 ¥3,000 — 1 kg of protein powder. My dev muscle grows.
support.amount_5000: 🛒 ¥5,000 — 1 kg protein + yogurt + natto + 1 kg chicken breast + eggs + bananas. A protein-packed grocery haul; max dev gains.
support.amount_9000: 💪💪💪 ¥9,000 — 3 kg of protein powder. Muscle, smiles, and dev hours all maxed out. LoPo runs strong next month too.
support.amount_14990: 🧗‍♂️ ¥14,990 — A STEADY ST115 pull-up tower (a home-gym staple). When a bug has me stuck, I hang from it to reset — my lats power LoPo's bug-fixing speed.
support.amount_74800: 🏋️‍♂️ ¥74,800 — A pair of FLEXBELL 32kg adjustable dumbbells (the gold standard; 1,198 reviews ★4.83). Spin the dial and the weight changes. My dev efficiency scales with my biceps.
support.amount_106920: 🥛 ¥106,920 — A year of protein (WPI, 2 scoops a day ≈ 22 kg/year). Top-value isolate, twice daily, never running out for a whole year. 365 days of full-power development.
support.amount_146410: 🏢 ¥146,410 — An IROTEC Power Rack HPM (¥99,990) + a 100 kg rubber barbell set (¥46,420). A corner of my room becomes a real home gym. Neither LoPo's servers nor my muscles will ever go down.
support.amounts_note: * Written as a joke — your support actually goes toward server costs and other operating expenses.
support.kofi_button_note: Tapping ☕ opens Ko-fi (external site) in a new tab.
support.disclaimer: This site is not an official SQUARE ENIX website and is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.

legal.privacy_intro: LoPo ("the Service") is an unofficial web service that provides fan-made tools for Final Fantasy XIV. It is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX. This page explains what information the Service handles and how we protect it, in plain language.
legal.privacy_section1_body: The Service handles three types of information:
legal.privacy_section1_auth_title: Information received when you log in
legal.privacy_section1_auth_items: The display name you set yourself,The icon image you upload yourself,Which login method you used (Discord or X)
legal.privacy_section1_plan_items: Mitigation sheet content (timeline, party composition, mitigation placement, etc.),Sheet titles and creation dates,Team logo image (only if you upload one yourself)
legal.privacy_section1_auto_items: To accurately count how many people viewed a shared sheet, we record a transformed version of your IP address that cannot be reversed back to the original,To prevent abuse, we temporarily record IP addresses (automatically deleted within 1 minute at most),To accurately count popular sheets, we receive a random anonymous ID (a string that does not identify you personally) generated in your browser
legal.privacy_section1b_title: About information received from external services during login
legal.privacy_section1b_body: When you log in with Discord or X, the authentication process causes user account information (user ID, display name, icon URL, etc.) to briefly reach our server via the external service's API. However, we only extract the user ID and immediately discard all other information without storing or recording it. The display name and icon shown in the app are only those you set yourself.
legal.privacy_section1d_title: How We Handle Your Discord User ID
legal.privacy_section1d_body: LoPo only stores the HMAC-SHA256 hash of your Discord user ID, combined with a server-side secret key. The original Discord ID is never saved in LoPo's database, and cannot be recovered by anyone—including LoPo operators. As a result, even if LoPo's data were ever leaked, the risk of your Discord account being identified is extremely low.
legal.privacy_section1c_body: This Service accepts donations only through PayPal via Ko-fi. When you make a voluntary donation, the following information reaches the operator (LoPo's developer) through Ko-fi's creator dashboard and through the PayPal dashboard the operator uses to receive donations. This is determined by how the Ko-fi and PayPal payment systems work and cannot be blocked from our side.
legal.privacy_section1c_kofi_title: Information visible in the Ko-fi dashboard
legal.privacy_section1c_kofi_items: The display name the supporter registered with Ko-fi — leaving the Display Name field blank causes "Somebody" to appear on the public page,The supporter's email address,Any cheer message they choose to write,Donation amount and timestamp
legal.privacy_section1c_paypal_title: Information visible in the PayPal dashboard
legal.privacy_section1c_paypal_items: The name the supporter registered with PayPal — typically a legal name for Personal accounts. For Business accounts a chosen display name,The supporter's PayPal-registered email address,Donation amount and timestamp
legal.privacy_section1c_promise_items: We will not contact you using your email address. We do not send marketing email and we do not share your information with third parties,We refer to this information only as needed for support-related troubleshooting and never for any other purpose,The operator does not separately store or record the information received. We only consult the Ko-fi or PayPal dashboards when necessary
legal.privacy_section1c_tips_items: Display name — leaving the Display Name field blank in the Ko-fi support form shows "Somebody" on the public page (a nickname also works). However the PayPal-registered name will still reach the operator's PayPal dashboard,PayPal account — using a Business account lets you display a chosen name when paying. PayPal's design still routes a name to the operator's PayPal dashboard so it cannot be hidden completely,Email address — please consider using an email different from the one you use day to day (e.g. one created specifically for donations)
legal.privacy_section2_body: The Service does not collect any of the following:
legal.privacy_section2_items: Email addresses (not received by our server during Discord/X login. See the Ko-fi donations section above for the Ko-fi case),Real names; home addresses; phone numbers; or other personal information,Payment information (card numbers and other payment details — even when going through Ko-fi the Service never touches them),In-game character names or play data,Display names or icons from external services (Discord/X) — even if received via API they are immediately discarded
legal.privacy_section3_items: Login and account management,Saving and syncing mitigation sheets across devices and sharing them with others,Counting popular sheets (understanding which sheets are most referenced),Preventing unauthorized access and abuse,Understanding how the Service is used so we can improve it,Handling any issues related to received donations
legal.privacy_section4_body: The Service relies on several external services to function. Here is what each one does:
legal.privacy_section4_service_providers: Google LLC,Google LLC,Google LLC,FFLogs,Upstash Inc.,Ko-fi Labs Limited,Discord Inc.
legal.privacy_section4_service_purposes: Used for login, data storage, and image hosting,Used for anonymous statistics like page views,Used to detect automated bot access,Used for importing combat data (only when you initiate it),Used for temporarily recording access frequency (abuse prevention),Used for accepting voluntary donations,Used for internal service operation notifications
legal.privacy_section4_analytics_note: About Google Analytics: We only collect anonymous statistics such as "how many times a page was viewed" and "whether visitors use mobile or desktop." No personally identifiable information is collected. For details, please see Google's Privacy Policy.
legal.privacy_section4_recaptcha_note: About reCAPTCHA Enterprise: This is used to determine whether access comes from a real person or an automated program. During this process, interaction patterns such as mouse movements may be sent to Google.
legal.privacy_section4_kofi_note: About Ko-fi: When you make a voluntary donation, the supporter's name, email address, donation message, timestamp, and amount reach the operator through Ko-fi's dashboard and the operator's PayPal dashboard. See "Information Received Through Donations (Ko-fi)" above for details.
legal.privacy_section5_cookie_items: When logging in with Discord or X, temporary security cookies are used (automatically deleted within 5 minutes),We do not use any advertising cookies
legal.privacy_section5_storage_items: Cached sheet data (for faster loading),Theme preference (dark/light mode),Temporary login state,A random anonymous ID used for popular-sheet counting
legal.privacy_section5_storage_note: These data are primarily stored only within your browser. However, the "anonymous ID for popular-sheet counting" is sent to our server when you copy a shared sheet (it is a non-identifying string used only to prevent double-counting).
legal.privacy_section6_title: 6. Where Data Is Stored and How Long We Keep It
legal.privacy_section6_body: Storage location and retention period vary by data type:
legal.privacy_section6_data_types: Account info & mitigation sheets,Team logo image,Shared sheets,Share preview image (OGP),Viewer records (irreversibly transformed),Anonymous copy-counting ID (random string),Anonymous copy records and daily copy aggregation,Access frequency records,Login cookies,Browser cache,Donor information received via Ko-fi and PayPal
legal.privacy_section6_data_locations: Google Firebase (Tokyo),Google Firebase Storage (US),Google Firebase (Tokyo),Google Firebase Storage (US),Google Firebase (Tokyo),Your browser,Google Firebase (Tokyo),Upstash (US East),Your browser,Your browser,Ko-fi / PayPal dashboards (the operator does not separately store this data)
legal.privacy_section6_data_periods: Until you delete your account,Until you delete it,Indefinitely,Auto-deleted after 30 days of no access,Indefinitely (the original IP address cannot be recovered),Until you clear your browser data,Daily aggregation entries older than 8 days are auto-deleted,Automatically deleted within 1 minute,Automatically deleted within 5 minutes,Until you delete it,According to each service's own privacy policy
legal.privacy_section6_note: If you are not logged in, no mitigation sheet is stored on our service. However, only when you copy a shared sheet, an anonymous ID (a non-identifying string) is sent to our server to prevent double-counting in the aggregation.
legal.privacy_section7_body: We do not give or sell your information to anyone. The only exceptions are the technical data exchanges required to operate the external services listed in Section 4, and legally required disclosures.
legal.privacy_collab_body: LoPo has a collaboration feature that lets several people edit one mitigation sheet at the same time. While doing so you can use an optional feature that shares in real time where each participant is looking (their cursor position).
legal.privacy_collab_items: Cursor sharing is off by default. It works only when you turn it on yourself.,Participants who turn it on connect directly browser-to-browser without going through our server (a P2P connection). Because of how this works your IP address may become visible to the people you are connected to. This is a common technology also used by video-call apps.,IP addresses are exchanged only between participants who have both turned cursor sharing on. The IP of anyone who leaves it off is never shared.,Turning cursor sharing off immediately closes that direct connection.,We do not store or record the IP addresses handled by this connection.
legal.privacy_collab_note: We recommend collaborating only with people you trust.
legal.privacy_section8_body: You can do any of the following at any time:
legal.privacy_section8_items: View, edit, or delete your mitigation sheets,Delete your account (all related data on our servers will also be deleted),Log out (stops data transmission to our servers),Clear data stored in your browser
legal.privacy_section9_body: The Service is not intended for anyone under the age of 16.
legal.privacy_section10_body: This policy may be updated as the Service evolves. If there are significant changes, we will notify you within the Service.
legal.privacy_section11_body: If you have any questions about this policy, feel free to reach out:
legal.terms_intro: These terms govern your use of LoPo ("the Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms.
legal.terms_section1_body: The Service is an unofficial web service providing multiple fan tools for Final Fantasy XIV, including a Mitigation Planner and a Housing Tour Planner. It is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.
legal.terms_section2_body: Login requires a Discord account. You are responsible for managing your account credentials. Basic features are available without login, but data will only be stored in your browser.
legal.terms_section3_items: You retain copyright over sheets you create,Sheets shared via the sharing feature can be viewed and copied by other users,The Service does not guarantee data persistence. Please back up important data yourself
legal.terms_section4_items: Unauthorized access or placing excessive load on the Service,Interfering with other users,Mass access via automated tools
legal.terms_section5_items: The Service is provided "as is",The operator is not liable for data loss or service interruptions,Accuracy of in-game data is not guaranteed
legal.terms_section6_body: The Service may be changed or terminated without notice.
legal.terms_section7_body: These terms may be updated without notice. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.terms_section8_intro: The Service allows you to upload images such as team logos. By uploading, you agree to the following conditions.
legal.terms_section8_items: Copyright of uploaded images remains with you. No rights are transferred to the Service,The Service may use your images non-exclusively as needed to operate (e.g. shared pages and OGP images),Only upload images for which you hold the copyright or have obtained permission to use,Uploading content that infringes on copyrights or portrait rights is prohibited,The operator is not liable for damages arising from uploaded images unless caused by intent or gross negligence,Content that violates these terms may be removed without prior notice
legal.terms_section8_contact: For reports regarding copyright infringement or content concerns, please contact us through:
legal.commercial_service_value: Operation of "LoPo", a fan tool portal for FFXIV. Free web tools including a Mitigation Planner
legal.commercial_payment_value: PayPal (processed through Ko-fi. Credit card payment is also possible via PayPal's guest checkout)
legal.commercial_delivery_value: The service is available immediately and free of charge. Support is a voluntary donation, not a payment for services
legal.commercial_refund_value: Due to the nature of voluntary support, refunds are not available

footer.share_text: A tool that makes something in FFXIV a little easier

stgy.page_title: PS5 Strategy Board Paste Helper | LoPo
stgy.heading: PS5 Strategy Board Paste Helper
stgy.intro: Paste a Strategy Board share code and we'll split it into chunks that fit PS5's paste limit. Copy them in order and paste into the game via PS Remote Play.
stgy.prep_body:
In the PS Remote Play app, open Settings (gear, top right) and turn on "Background Streaming".
This keeps the connection alive for up to 5 minutes when you switch apps, so you can go back and forth between LoPo and the game.
stgy.lp_desc: For PS5 players using Remote Play on a phone or tablet. Splits Strategy Board share codes into game-friendly chunks to copy.

content.description: Select content from the sidebar to load the timeline.

party_open.description: Click the Party Comp button to configure your team.

select_slot.description: Click the H1 (Healer) slot to select it.

pick_blm.description: A healer slot with Black Mage? That's fine — any job can go anywhere!

delete_job.description: Click the trash button to remove it. Try again anytime.

palette_hint.description: Just like Warrior and White Mage — click a job icon and it finds a good slot. Handy!

auto_fill.message: We'll fill in the rest for you!

damage_check.description: Red numbers mean the party will wipe without mitigation. Let's fix that.

select_miti.description: Select Reprisal to protect the whole party!

focus_mode.description: Press "F" (or tap it) to try Focus Mode — it hides everything but the table!

focus_done.message: Use this when you want to focus!

real_complete.message: Tutorial complete — for real this time!

open_modal.message: Let's make a plan from scratch!
open_modal.description: Create mitigation plans for any dungeon or content.

category.message: Pick a type — let's try Dungeon

name.description: You can name it anything you like.

add_event.description: Click the + button to add an attack.

fill_event.message: We'll enter the attack name and damage
fill_event.description: Watch — we'll type it in for you.

miti.description: Sacred Soil and Divine Veil are already selected! Click Reprisal.

done.description: Add a thumbnail image or team logo, then share your plan with everyone.

completion.title: You've got the basics!
completion.menu_hint: You can revisit tutorials anytime from the tutorial menu.

completion_real.title: Okay, NOW you're done!
completion_real.menu_hint: You can revisit tutorials anytime from the tutorial menu.

new_plan.template_guidance: Want to start from a pre-filled template?

new_plan.plan_limit_per_content: You can have up to {{max}} plans per content.
new_plan.plan_archive_warning: You have over {{threshold}} plans. Older plans outside of current Savage and Ultimate tiers will be automatically archived.
new_plan.guest_hint: Your data is saved in this browser only and will be lost if you clear cookies or close incognito mode. <login>Sign in</login> to keep your data safe.
new_plan.guest_hint_short: Data is saved on this device only. <login>Sign in</login> to keep it safe.

memo.help_tooltip: Left click: edit / Right click: delete / Drag: move

mobile.import_spreadsheet_desc: Copy your spreadsheet and paste it

mobile_guide.title: Getting Started
mobile_guide.step1_desc: Tap "Menu" at the bottom to pick a raid and create a mitigation plan
mobile_guide.step2_desc: Tap the "Party" button at the top of the Menu to assign jobs
mobile_guide.step3_desc: Tap a damage number to add mitigation skills for that attack
mobile_guide.step4_desc: Use "Import" at the bottom for FFLogs, and "Auto" in the Menu to auto-build mitigations
mobile_guide.step5_desc: Long press job icons and drag them to slots
mobile_guide.step6_desc: Long press a timeline card to add, edit, or delete events

nav.deleteAccountMessage: This action cannot be undone. All your mitigation plans and settings will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

popular_consent.title: About sharing
popular_consent.body_1: Shared mitigation sheets are aggregated anonymously and may appear on the Popular page if they become widely used.
popular_consent.body_2: If your logo is enabled, it will also appear on the Popular page (good for team promotion). To stay anonymous, turn off the logo before sharing.

popular.title: Popular Sheets
popular.subtitle: Most used mitigation sheets
popular.no_data_desc: Share your sheets to see them here
popular.open_popular: Maybe a plan for any party?

miti_sheet.limit_reached_toast: Sheet limit reached ({{max}}) for this content. Delete unused sheets to copy.
miti_sheet.info_compat: Different party comp? No problem — change members after copy and Skill Compatibility will auto-adjust
miti_sheet.info_new_plan: Added as a new sheet (your current sheet won't be overwritten) · Max {{max}} per content
miti_sheet.footer_readonly: Read-only preview · Copy to edit as your own sheet

housing_reports.title: Housing reports
housing_reports.description: Review reported listings and hide them if necessary. Restore and bans are handled separately.
housing_reports.dismiss_one_confirm: Delete this report record and reduce the count by 1? The listing will be auto-restored if the count drops below 3.

personal_tags.title: Personal tag reports
personal_tags.description: Review reported personal tags and hide them if necessary. Restoring also clears the report records.
personal_tags.unhide_confirm: Restore this tag? Its report records will be cleared.

housinger_reports.title: Housinger reports
housinger_reports.description: Review reported Housinger profiles and force-hide them if necessary. There is no automatic hide threshold, so this requires human judgment. Force-hidden profiles stay listed here even after their report count reaches zero.
housinger_reports.dismiss_one_confirm: Delete this report record and reduce the report count by 1?

admin.ugc_description: Paste a share URL to view and manage uploaded logo images.
admin.ugc_delete_confirm: Delete this logo? This image will also be blocked from future shares. This action cannot be undone.
admin.ugc_delete_success: Logo deleted and added to blocklist
admin.popular_no_plans: No shared plans for this content
admin.popular_hide_confirm: Hide "{{title}}" from all users' bottom sheet. OK? (You can show again later)
admin.popular_unhide_confirm: Show "{{title}}" in the bottom sheet again. OK?
admin.popular_select_a_card: Select a card on the left

bar.label: ⚠ This sheet is currently stored only inside this device. Because you're not logged in, the browser may erase it without warning. Don't forget to export a backup ── please read this once.
bar.aria: About your local data safety (please read)

modal.title: This sheet is stored only inside this device
modal.why_body: While you are not logged in, your sheets live only in this browser. Browsers may clear stored data depending on free space and usage — and on iPhone / Safari in particular, data is automatically erased if you don't open the site for about a week. This is browser behavior and cannot be fully prevented.
modal.protect_heading: How to keep your sheets safe
modal.backup_desc: Export to a file and keep it — you can restore even if it's erased (most reliable).
modal.ios_body: Tap the Share button in Safari → "Add to Home Screen" to use it like an app and avoid the automatic erasure above.
modal.login_note: Logging in also saves to the cloud automatically, so your sheets survive across devices.

backup.export_description: Download the file and keep it in a safe place. You can also copy the text and paste it into a notepad.
backup.export_select_hint: Choose which sheets to back up
backup.ios_save_hint: On iPhone a share menu opens — choose "Save to Files".
backup.export_large_notice: Preview hidden because the data is large. Use the buttons below to save or copy.
backup.restore_description: Paste the backup text into the area below, or select a downloaded file.
backup.restore_invalid_json: Invalid backup data. Please paste the correct backup text.
backup.restore_confirm_1_message: Your current sheets will be overwritten with the backup data. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restore_confirm_2_message: {{backupCount}} sheet(s) from the backup will be merged into your current {{currentCount}} sheet(s).

boundary_modal.select_banner: Click to select end position (Esc to cancel)
boundary_modal.select_banner_start: Click to select start position (Esc to cancel)

sheetImport.title: Import a mitigation sheet from a spreadsheet
sheetImport.phase_name_placeholder: e.g. P1 Statue of the Gods
sheetImport.pending_draft_warning: You have pasted content that hasn't been added yet. Press "Add this phase".
sheetImport.party_required_warning: Assign every party slot above ("Assign party slots") to enable import.
sheetImport.parse_failed: No data table found. Select all in the sheet and copy again.
sheetImport.limit_reached: This content has reached the sheet limit (5). What now?
sheetImport.limit_delete_one: Delete one existing sheet and create
sheetImport.rights_notice: You are responsible for the rights to the content you import
sheetImport.party_assign_hint: Place each detected job into MT–D4
sheetImport.party_incomplete: Assign every job to a slot to continue
sheetImport.add_more_or_next: Got another phase? Paste it the same way. Otherwise continue.

gridImport.title: Import from spreadsheet
gridImport.help: Columns with a recognizable header are mapped automatically regardless of position. For the rest, set "What is this column?" or choose "Ignore".
gridImport.slot_unassigned_warning: Some member columns have no slot assigned
gridImport.rights_notice: Imported data is a conversion of your own copy. Please respect the original author's rights.
gridImport.paste_error: Couldn't paste. Copy again, or allow paste access.
gridImport.parse_failed: Couldn't read the pasted content. Check your copy range and paste it again.
gridImport.no_phases_warning: No events yet. Paste your spreadsheet.
gridImport.party_incomplete_warning: Assign a slot to every member column that has skills.
gridImport.flow_hint: Click A1 in spreadsheet → Ctrl+A → Ctrl+C → paste here (Ctrl+V)
gridImport.unresolved_note: Not in LoPo — won't be imported. Correct to an official name to import.
gridImport.no_time_warning: A Time (M:SS) column is required. Name the header "Time" or use "What is this column? → Time".
gridImport.format_hint: Use official names for jobs and skills, and include a Time (M:SS) column.
gridImport.no_party_detected: No party detected. You can still create.
gridImport.mobile_copy_hint: In Google Sheets, select the range you want and copy it, then long-press the box below and tap Paste.
gridImport.mobile_paste_empty: Nothing pasted yet. Paste into the box above.
